allow: Bash(# Login first curl -s -c /tmp/nuvu_cookies.txt -d ""password=NUVU2026"" -L http://127.0.0.1:5000/login # Test 1: Dashboard loads echo ""=== TEST 1: Dashboard ==="" curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""HTTP %{http_code} \(%{size_download} bytes\)\\n"" -b /tmp/nuvu_cookies.txt http://127.0.0.1:5000/ # Test 2: Property page loads echo ""=== TEST 2: Property page ==="" curl -s -o /dev/null -w ""HTTP %{http_code} \(%{size_download} bytes\)\\n"" -b /tmp/nuvu_cookies.txt http://127.0.0.1:5000/property/stalled # Test 3: Completion Engine API echo ""=== TEST 3: Completion Engine API ==="" curl -s -b /tmp/nuvu_cookies.txt http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/completion-engine/stalled | python3 -m json.tool)
